/usr/bin/ar qc libimgengine.a CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/memory_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/context.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/image.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/ops/crop.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/ops/resize.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/ops/border.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/layout/grid_layout.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/layout/auto_fit.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/io/stb_impl.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/api/api.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgengine.a
